name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.ConfigureBulletsExtraHelper.RbMomentOneLeg
summary: If only one leg in contact: 0.0 only force, 0.5 = force and half the rigid body moment applied, 1.0 = force and full rigidBody moment.
remarks:
Default value = 1.0f.
            Min value = 0.0f.
            Max value = 1.0f.
